ogTitle: Balhannah vs Ballast Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Balhannah and Ballast Head.
heading: Balhannah vs Ballast Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Balhannah, South Australia and Ballast Head, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ballast Head has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Balhannah (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Balhannah or Ballast Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Balhannah has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Ballast Head scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Balhannah scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Ballast Head scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Balhannah or Ballast Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ballast Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
